failures.description: The agent failed by planning to search all Vacuum Cleaners regardless of availability instead of filtering for available items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner. The required tool call should filter to available products, but at step 1 the agent planned ProductCatalogSearch with "available_only": false. All required information was already available from the user request, and the agent deviated from the required action sequence by choosing the wrong availability filter. Although the final answer happened to identify an available cheapest item, the original plan/tool-call error was never corrected.
